title: ExampleSite / Imports / Lineage / Relationships
summary: exampleSite/imports/lineage/relationships.json is preserved as a raw Hugo source artifact in the XanaNode Hugo substrate.
content:
{
  "relationships": [
    {

    },
    {

    },
